creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 182808
svn diff for graphics/tiff

graphics/tiff: update from 4.0.7 to 4.0.8.

It throws some libtool warnings during build, but the old version of the port does that too. Not sure how to fix that.

Tested with poudriere testport on 11.0-amd64, 11.0-i386, 10.3-amd64, 10.3-i386.

portlint -C also gives a couple warnings, but they were also there before.
